title: Tool Design, Errors, Pagination, and Context Efficiency · Protocol Clinic: Descriptions Schemas
summary: Refine an MCP server whose tools are ambiguous and return too much data. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext descriptions schemas increment in an efficient tool API and evaluation suite. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Write discriminative descriptions, constrained schemas, examples, and side-effect metadata.
Choose tool granularity that maps to meaningful user intent without unsafe generic execution.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Build Descriptions Schemas evidence

  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
